name: vike-toolbar
description: Toolbar extension: a fixed logo button + popover that OTHER extensions contribute simple settings into, via a cumulative `toolbarItems` seam (same pattern as nav/themes/messages). A framework-agnostic core (item normalization + composition) plus per-framework UI as subpaths (vike-toolbar/react, and vue/solid later). One package, install and import the subpath for your framework.
